name: Symbol Extractor
notes: Phase B.2 Symbol Extractor (D1 second target). Own packages/ingestion/src/extractor/** only. Consume frozen 103 public API (SyntaxTree/SyntaxNode/query) — do not re-own or rewrite packages/ingestion/src/parser/** except documented defect fixes under separate 103 auth. Prefer ingestion-local symbol model for B.2 freeze (103 is core-free); Draft §19 'types from core' is optional alignment read of SymbolContext shape only — no packages/core edits, no graph storage (201), no 105 dependency graph, no 102 indexer, no 101 live adapters, no extractor IPC. Layer 4 defines B.2 independent freeze gates; full-spec DoD language about 101/105 integration is deferred consumer work. Implementation not authorized by governance artifacts alone.
